programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli looks at how surviving in deep space can become a reality; Lockheed Martin is designing a spacecraft, similar to a smaller International Space Station, in which astronauts can make a three-year trip to Mars and back.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: With a little inspiration from Mother Nature, scientists are finding exciting new ways to grow and store food; microscopic bacteria can create organic fertilizer; 3-D ocean farming; refrigeration inspired by ants, elephants and kangaroos.
